original_hypothesis.title: LendingTerm.forgive() on Active Auction Creates Stuck Auction, Permanently Inflating nAuctionsInProgress
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: LendingTerm.forgive() does not check if the loan is currently in an active auction (callTime != 0). If a governor calls forgive() on a loan that has been called and has an active auction, it sets closeTime and decrements issuance. Subsequently, any attempt to settle the auction via AuctionHouse.bid() or AuctionHouse.forgive() calls LendingTerm.onBid(), which reverts because `require(loans[loanId].closeTime == 0)`. The auction can never complete, and nAuctionsInProgress is permanently stuck above 0, blocking LendingTerm.setAuctionHouse().
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The loan state machine allows a direct Open/Called -> Closed transition via forgive() that bypasses the auction settlement path, creating an impossible auction state.

proof_of_signal.pattern: forgive() checks borrowTime != 0 and closeTime == 0 but NOT callTime == 0; line 556 sets closeTime; onBid at line 588 requires closeTime == 0

preconditions: A loan is in an active auction (callTime != 0, closeTime == 0)
Governor calls forgive() on that loanId
Governor role is required - not exploitable by unprivileged users

initial_operational_evidence.admin_dependency: GOVERNOR role required - this is an admin operation bug, not an external attack
initial_operational_evidence.exploitation_window: While a loan is in active auction

operational_questions: Can governor recover from this via emergencyAction on AuctionHouse?
Does the double issuance decrement cause further accounting issues?
Is forgive() during auction a documented emergency procedure?
validation_requirements: Test: call loan -> forgive loan -> attempt to bid on auction

preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_1: Compromised or mistaken governor calls forgive() on a loan with active auction
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_2: Auction enters irrecoverable state - onBid reverts
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_4: setAuctionHouse blocked, requiring emergencyAction to fix

potential_operational_impact.operational_disruption: Stuck auction state; potential accounting inconsistency in issuance
potential_operational_impact.recovery_difficulty: Requires governor emergencyAction to manually fix AuctionHouse nAuctionsInProgress
potential_operational_impact.affected_operations: AuctionHouse management, future auction house upgrades

investigation_priorities.on_chain_signals: forgive() called on a loan where callTime != 0
investigation_priorities.operational_anomalies: nAuctionsInProgress stuck at non-zero when no auctions are active

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
